## Question

What are we trying to learn?

## Hypothesis

What do we expect to find?

## Method

How should the experiment be run?

## Decision criteria

- [ ] Continue
- [ ] Park
- [ ] Reject

## Notes

Constraints, references, or prototype ideas.
